texto: June’s clients did not have the patience to deal with problems or the personal courage and energy to find solutions on their own. What they did have was an almost endless supply of capital. With that capital, June’s clients could hire people to solve any problem with minimal effort. That is what June did; she solved problems by the process of elimination.
explicacao: Citação de Clark Chamberlain sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “June’s clients did not have the patience to deal with problems or the personal courage and energy…” articula coragem, assassin, problems em registro de coragem, com relevância para contextos como termino e problems.
